<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Console\Helper; use Symfony\Component\Console\Input\InputAwareInterface; use Symfony\Component\Console\Input\InputInterface; /** * An implementation of InputAwareInterface for Helpers. * * @author Wouter J <waldio.webdesign@gmail.com> */ abstract class InputAwareHelper extends Helper implements InputAwareInterface { protected InputInterface $input; public function setInput(InputInterface $input): void { $this->input = $input; } }
